mapper.select: SELECT transition_id, definition_id, source_node_key, target_node_key, condition_field, condition_operator, condition_value, is_default, sort_order FROM ticket_workflow_transition WHERE definition_id = #{definitionId} ORDER BY source_node_key, sort_order, transition_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_workflow_transition (definition_id, source_node_key, target_node_key, condition_field, condition_operator, condition_value, is_default, sort_order) VALUES (#{definitionId}, #{sourceNodeKey}, #{targetNodeKey}, #{conditionField}, #{conditionOperator}, #{conditionValue}, #{defaultTransition}, #{sortOrder})
